creator: dan@langille.org
text:
Matthew,=20

Thank you.  It's always good to have help with the Bacula ports.

Have a look at http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3Dports/167700 =
which we are trying to get ready for commit.
It solves the issue by making bacula-client required by bacula-server.

I think that will fix the issue which this PR addresses.  It covers =
other issues as well.=20

Do you concur?

--=20
Dan Langille - http://langille.org
